subcategory: animated chart card with hover expansion
use_cases: Displaying weekly visitor analytics on analytics dashboards
Interactive chart cards for SaaS platform metrics pages
Animated data visualization for marketing or traffic reports
Real-time visitor tracking displays for admin or management panels
ai_summary: An animated chart card component that displays visitor statistics with an integrated line chart and hover-triggered expansion animation. Features smooth number transitions using AnimatePresence, dark mode support via Tailwind's dark: prefix, and an SVG-based chart visualization with motion path animations. The card presents weekly data across seven days with interactive day selection and animated value updates.
